name: Bean Curd Szechwan Style
recipeIngredient: 4 pieces tofu (from block 1/2 inch thick), cubed
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat 2 tablespoons of oil in a wok. Stir-fry ginger and scallions for 30 seconds. Add pork and stir-fry for 1 minute. Add soy sauce and sherry, cooking for an additional minute. Remove the mixture to a plate.
2. Heat another 2 tablespoons of oil in the wok. Add tofu, soy sauce, stock, chili paste, and sugar (or sweetener). Cook until heated through.
3. Place the pork mixture on top of the tofu. Cook over high heat for 2 minutes. If desired, add cornstarch to thicken the sauce. Finally, stir in garlic and gently combine with the sauce.
